title: Kawamel's Crafts
name: Kawamel ✦
biography: In 2021, I started a course in Concept Art and Illustration with the aim of obtaining a Bachelor's degree in this field. Since then, I've been working on a number of personal projects to develop my skills.
buisness-start: Since 2025, I'm officially starting my business as a freelance illustrator and storyboard artist.
contact-text: If you are interested send an email and add as object "Commission Illustration" at mele.bdra@gmail.com - Professional Contact ONLY
